sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67971" key="misetairi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῑσ-εταιρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67971.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hatred of one's comrades</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.64</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
